topStories.title: Fed begins Warsh era with rate hold, sees hike possible later in 2026
topStories.summary: The Federal Reserve maintained interest rates but signaled a potential hike later this year due to inflation concerns.  New projections show nine officials anticipate a rate increase by the end of 2026.  The policy statement removed previous guidance on future rate moves, reflecting new Fed Chairman Kevin Warsh's influence.

topStories.title: Gold falls 1% after Fed holds rates steady, signals rate hike this year
topStories.summary: Gold prices fell significantly on Wednesday. The U.S. Federal Reserve kept interest rates unchanged but indicated a possible increase later this year. This move strengthened the U.S. dollar, making gold more expensive for international buyers. Markets now anticipate a higher chance of a rate hike in December. Other precious metals like silver, platinum, and palladium also experienced declines.

Dollar jumps as Fed holds rates but projects one hike later this year
topStories.summary: The dollar strengthened as the Federal Reserve held interest rates steady but signaled a potential hike later this year, with policymakers raising inflation projections. New Fed Chairman Kevin Warsh's revised statement removed forward guidance, impacting market expectations. Meanwhile, other central banks like the BOE and BOJ are also navigating inflation concerns.

topStories.title: US stocks: Nasdaq, S&P fall over 1% as Fed holds rates; traders raise hike bets
topStories.summary: US stocks tumbled Wednesday as traders anticipated a Federal Reserve rate hike, with policymakers projecting rising interest rates later this year. New Fed Chair Kevin Warsh emphasized taming inflation, shifting sentiment from expected rate cuts. This hawkish tilt led to significant market declines across major indices.

business.title: Gold falls 1% after Fed holds rates steady, signals rate hike this year
business.summary: Gold prices fell significantly on Wednesday. The U.S. Federal Reserve kept interest rates unchanged but indicated a possible increase later this year. This move strengthened the U.S. dollar, making gold more expensive for international buyers. Markets now anticipate a higher chance of a rate hike in December. Other precious metals like silver, platinum, and palladium also experienced declines.

business.title: Dollar jumps as Fed holds rates but projects one hike later this year
business.summary: The dollar strengthened as the Federal Reserve held interest rates steady but signaled a potential hike later this year, with policymakers raising inflation projections. New Fed Chairman Kevin Warsh's revised statement removed forward guidance, impacting market expectations. Meanwhile, other central banks like the BOE and BOJ are also navigating inflation concerns.

business.title: US stocks: Nasdaq, S&P fall over 1% as Fed holds rates; traders raise hike bets
business.summary: US stocks tumbled Wednesday as traders anticipated a Federal Reserve rate hike, with policymakers projecting rising interest rates later this year. New Fed Chair Kevin Warsh emphasized taming inflation, shifting sentiment from expected rate cuts. This hawkish tilt led to significant market declines across major indices.

business.title: US Federal Reserve keeps interest rates unchanged, projects one rate hike for 2026
business.summary: The Federal Reserve held interest rates steady at 3.5%-3.75% in Kevin Warsh's first meeting, with policymakers signaling potential rate hikes to combat surging inflation. Despite economic expansion and strong job gains, elevated inflation, partly due to Middle East conflict and energy prices, is a growing concern.
